label: List all domains
cypher: MATCH (d:Domain) RETURN d.name AS domain, d.description AS description ORDER BY d.name

label: How many applications per domain?
cypher: MATCH (d:Domain)-[:CONTAINS]->(a:Application) RETURN d.name AS domain, count(a) AS applications ORDER BY applications DESC

label: List all business units
cypher: MATCH (bu:BusinessUnit) RETURN bu.name AS business_unit, bu.description AS description ORDER BY bu.name

label: Show all teams with their leads
cypher: MATCH (t:Team) OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[:LEADS]->(t) RETURN t.name AS team, t.lead AS lead_name, t.headcount AS headcount ORDER BY t.name

label: Which teams belong to which business unit?
cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(bu:BusinessUnit) RETURN bu.name AS business_unit, collect(t.name) AS teams ORDER BY bu.name

label: Applications grouped by vendor
cypher: MATCH (a:Application) WHERE a.vendor IS NOT NULL RETURN a.vendor AS vendor, collect(a.name) AS applications ORDER BY vendor

label: Which applications have the most dependencies?
cypher: MATCH (a:Application)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(dep) RETURN a.name AS application, count(dep) AS dependency_count ORDER BY dependency_count DESC LIMIT 10

label: List all platforms with their vendors
cypher: MATCH (p:Platform) RETURN p.name AS platform, p.vendor AS vendor, p.type AS type ORDER BY p.name

label: Servers grouped by network
cypher: MATCH (s:Server)-[:IN_NETWORK]->(n:Network) RETURN n.name AS network, n.cidr AS cidr, collect(s.hostname) AS servers ORDER BY network

label: Databases grouped by engine
cypher: MATCH (db:Database) RETURN db.engine AS engine, collect({name: db.name, environment: db.environment}) AS databases ORDER BY engine

label: Migration waves and their status
cypher: MATCH (w:MigrationWave) OPTIONAL MATCH (w)-[:IN_PROGRAM]->(p:MigrationProgram) RETURN p.name AS program, w.name AS wave, w.status AS status, w.start_date AS start_date, w.end_date AS end_date ORDER BY w.start_date

label: Applications in each migration wave
cypher: MATCH (a:Application)-[:PART_OF_WAVE]->(w:MigrationWave) RETURN w.name AS wave, w.status AS status, collect(a.name) AS applications ORDER BY wave

label: Target platforms for migration
cypher: MATCH (a:Application)-[:MIGRATING_TO]->(tp:TargetPlatform) RETURN tp.name AS target_platform, tp.provider AS provider, count(a) AS application_count ORDER BY application_count DESC
